name: Savoury Salmon Bread Cases
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and add flour and seasoning. Cook for 2 minutes.
2. Gradually add the combined milk and salmon liquid to the mixture. Return to heat.
3. Stir constantly until the mixture boils and thickens.
4. Add remaining ingredients and mix through. Place hot filling into heated bread cases and serve.
Bread Cases:
1. Brush both sides of bread with melted butter.
2. Press diagonal corners into deep base patty tins.
3. Bake at 200°C for approximately 10-15 minutes until crisp and golden.
